parameters.query:
SELECT
  bp.id             AS business_id,
  bp.tenant_id,
  bp.business_name,
  bp.description,
  bp.location,
  bp.store_token,
  bp.logo_url,
  bp.business_mode,
  pi_tg.bot_username,
  pi_tg.access_token  AS bot_token,
  t.whatsapp_no       AS wa_number
FROM table_1 bp
LEFT JOIN table_2 t
  ON t.id = bp.tenant_id
LEFT JOIN table_3 pi_tg
  ON pi_tg.business_id = bp.id
  AND pi_tg.platform = 'telegram'
  AND pi_tg.is_active = true
WHERE bp.store_token = $1
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  COALESCE(display_name, product_name) AS display_name,
  product_name                          AS canonical_name,
  minio_url,
  price,
  price_label,
  COALESCE(show_on_store, true)         AS is_available,
  COALESCE(image_type, 'product')       AS image_type,
  sort_order
FROM table_4
column_1 $1::uuid
  AND COALESCE(show_on_store, true) = true
  AND COALESCE(image_type, 'product') = 'product'
ORDER BY sort_order ASC NULLS LAST, created_at DESC
LIMIT 50
